title: Medley of YTPMV Ver.2 (Canceled Project)
description:
EDIT (08/07/2013):
As you can see, this project of mine is pretty dead, but if anyone one wants, they could try and finish this. Here's the .FLP file:
https://www.dropbox.com/s/raevct92cowfnuw/
https://www.mediafire.com/file/lcevm2fmael8nyd/

Old preview (28/08/2011):
https://www.dropbox.com/s/kwo1vhytxuwp5d6/
https://www.mediafire.com/file/dss7l172sx9pdif/

***

Just something to show that I'm actually working on this. The continuation from the 8th song onwards is still uncertain, so you can still suggest songs for this project. And while you're at it, you can help me fill in the missing song info, like - for example - the real title of the first song, if there is any.

DISCLAIMER: All of the demonstrative videos belongs to their respective owners
